examples: Objective To investigate root canal curvatures of human maxillary first premolars in buccolingual directions.
The segments had the biomechanical properties of osteoporosis. 100 N and 30 N loads were applied along the implant axial(AX) and buccolingual(BL) directions respectively.
Results: The geometric feature parameters of 28 artificial teeth in their own coordinates were obtained, including the mesiodistal and buccolingual dimension, the height and inclination of cusp.
